title: Caveats table (cross-cadence misleading-join banners)
description: Hand-authored caveat catalogue. Per D16 this surface is for CROSS-CADENCE MISLEADING-JOIN banners ONLY (e.g. 'this chart joins monthly RBI cash data against annual MoSPI accruals — magnitudes are not directly comparable'). Methodology / base-year breaks live on the SEPARATE methodology-breaks.json surface — conflating them merges two distinct citizen risks into one ambiguous banner. Authoring shape JSON (D18); pipeline compiles to taxonomy/caveats.parquet.

x-changelog.description: Initial canonical caveats table schema (Phase 0.3 of TODO/20260517-canonical-long-format-pivot.md). Scope per D16: cross-cadence misleading-join banners only. Carries the (indicator_ids[] or family) trigger condition + the banner body text. Loader joins caveats to chart-shell view-model (D19); chart renders one banner per matched caveat.

kind.description: Type of misleading-join risk this caveat warns about. cross_methodology_vintage_within_series is for the rare case where a single indicator's vintage drifts within the displayed range — distinct from a hard methodology BREAK (which lives on methodology-breaks.json).

trigger.description: Condition the loader matches against the active chart's view-model to decide whether to surface this banner. Exactly one of (indicator_ids[], indicator_pair, family) is populated.

indicator_ids.description: Triggers when ANY of these indicator_ids appears in the view-model.

indicator_pair.description: Triggers when BOTH indicator_ids are present in the same view-model (a join condition).

family.description: Triggers for any view-model drawing from this family.

banner_short.description: Citizen-readable short copy (inline above the chart).

source_url.description: Optional pointer to the authoritative explainer (publisher methodology doc, Hans note, etc.).
